title: /tfi
text: /tfi Play back the recorded keystrokes stored in a test file output file. /tfi { = FileName } Description Play back the named TFO (Test File Output) file. If no name is given, shell.tfo is played back, by default. Note: The application must be running in character mode (that is, $GUI=$CHR ). Related Links /tfo Record keystrokes in a Uniface application running in character mode to an ASCII file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
